caption: A woman with short dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic with decorative embroidery and small red floral accents around the neckline, and a dark beaded necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a circular logo appears with the text "NPTEL" written in white beside it. As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions change slightly as she speaks; she begins with an open mouth, briefly closes her eyes and mouth in a blink or pause, and then opens her mouth again to continue talking. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, and no other people or objects are present in the scene.
